# Thabet Amer

> Technical Leader & Solutions Architect with 15+ years of experience in software engineering, cloud infrastructure, DevOps, and product management. Based in the US, working globally. Co-founder of a Medtech startup. Fluent in English and Arabic.

## Portfolio

- [English Portfolio](https://thabetamer.com): Full professional overview — experience, projects, credentials, and contact
- [Arabic Portfolio](https://thabetamer.com/ar/): Arabic-language version of the same profile

## Services

- Technical leadership (CTO, Tech Lead, Director of Engineering)
- Solutions architecture and cloud infrastructure (AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform)
- DevOps and CI/CD pipeline design and optimization
- Product and project management (Agile, Scrum, PMP, PSM)
- System design for startups and enterprise scale

## Notable Clients

IQVIA, CARE International, IRC/Sesame Street, Cambridge Education, American Bar Association, DAI, EDC, CNFA, Abt Associates, IBTCI, Mercy Corps, UNODC, Hunter Douglas, Konektid International, Souktel, Unblocked Brands

## Certifications

- AWS Certified AI Practitioner
- PMP (Project Management Professional)
- PSM I (Professional Scrum Master)

## Education

- Indiana University of Pennsylvania (IUP)
- Birzeit University

## Specializations

Cloud Architecture, DevOps, Kubernetes, Docker, AWS, Terraform, CI/CD, Agile/Scrum, Product Management, Technical Leadership, ICT4D, EdTech, AgriTech, SaaS, Blockchain/NFT

## Languages

- English (Fluent)
- Arabic (Native)
